summary.zh-CN: 远程语音输入升级为命令式定向投递，后端新增场景快照与命令执行通道，前端也补上本地化命令标签和更适合移动端的输入页面。
summary.en: Remote voice input now uses command-based targeted delivery, adding scene-aware snapshots and command execution on the backend plus localized labels and a more mobile-friendly i...

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

  • 远程语音输入升级为命令式定向投递，后端新增场景快照与命令执行通道，前端也补上本地化命令标签和更适合移动端的输入页面。
  • 提案规划方向改为可视化多方向选择器，支持预览面板、双语说明、紧凑布局触发器和更清晰的阶段主操作。
  • 多语言体系扩展到 9 个语言环境，并切换到新的 hagi18n 生成流程，运行时语言排序、语言标签和 en-US 规范化更一致。
  • Git AI commit 新增“push 前先 rebase”的持久化默认设置，设置页、提交抽屉和后端配置会保持同一行为。
  • 会话列表新增 Hero 头像展示，Hero 批量命名池也改为走 i18n 数据源，角色相关界面的一致性更好。
  • 平台侧新增 Steam 同步与成就同步基础能力，为后续 Steam 账号与成就联动打下基础。

稳定性与诊断

  • Copilot 与 Claude 辅助链路新增权限模式、托管 CLI 路径解析、reasoning 元数据、thinking buffer、空闲超时和响应体积跟踪，长会话反馈更完整。
  • OmniRoute 与 AI 状态诊断改为共享模型抓取、探测模式显示、自适应轮询缓存，并把 CLI 就绪检查和模型可用性校验分开处理。
  • 对话与工具结果分组更加稳定，关联 tool result 会留在同一消息组，ToolDetailModal 摘要区条件也已修正。
  • 发送消息时会读取最新输入框内容并拦截空消息，远程输入目标分发也从租约组改为实例级定向，减少状态错位。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

  • Remote voice input now uses command-based targeted delivery, adding scene-aware snapshots and command execution on the backend plus localized labels and a more mobile-friendly input page on the frontend.
  • Proposal planning now uses a visual multi-direction selector with preview panels, bilingual descriptions, compact-layout triggers, and clearer stage primary actions.
  • Localization now supports nine locales and moves onto the hagi18n generation workflow, making runtime ordering, language labels, and en-US normalization more consistent.
  • Git AI commit now supports a persistent rebase-before-push default that stays aligned across settings, the commit drawer, and backend configuration.
  • Session lists now show hero avatars, and the hero batch-name pool now comes from i18n data instead of hardcoded arrays for more consistent character surfaces.
  • Platform services now include the first Steam synchronization and achievement-sync foundation for future Steam account and achievement workflows.

Reliability and Diagnostics

  • Copilot and Claude helper flows now expose permission modes, managed CLI path resolution, reasoning metadata, a thinking buffer, idle timeouts, and response-size tracking for better long-running session feedback.
  • OmniRoute and AI diagnostics now share model fetching, show probe mode and executable paths, use adaptive polling and caching, and separate CLI readiness from model-aware validation.
  • Conversation and tool-result grouping are now more stable, keeping linked tool results together and fixing ToolDetailModal summary conditions.
  • Sending now reads the latest textarea content and rejects empty messages, while remote input routing now targets individual instances instead of lease-based groups.
